data.title: Humanoid Global launches new marketing services, strictly restricted from US dissemination or news wire services.
data.description: This information is not intended for distribution in the United States or through U.S. newswire services. Please refrain from disseminating this information in those regions. Thank you.
RBNZ says the committee will carefully monitor incoming economic data before making policy adjustments.
RBNZ says if economic conditions follow expectations, policy is expected to stay accommodative for an extended period.
RBNZ says the economy remains in the early phase of its recovery.
RBNZ says as the recovery gains momentum and inflation moves steadily toward the midpoint of the target range, monetary policy will be normalized gradually.
RBNZ says inflation is likely to return to the 1–3 percent target range within the current quarter.
RBNZ says the labour market is stabilizing, though unemployment levels remain high.
RBNZ says despite growth in residential and business investment, household spending continues to be cautious.
RBNZ says inflation risks are balanced at this stage.

data.title: 2026 Air Race X to feature 6 confirmed pilots including World Champion Yoshihide Muroya. Two debut pilots to be revealed in March.
data.description: A total of six pilots have been officially confirmed for the upcoming 2026 season of AIR RACE X, with a mix of experienced world champions and promising newcomers. Among the six pilots, there are multiple world champions and rising stars set to compete in the thrilling races. Additionally, two debut pilots are scheduled to be revealed in March. The announcement was made in Tokyo, Osaka, and Sapporo, Japan on February 17, 2026. Fans can look forward to witnessing these skilled aviators in action as they take on the challenges of the upcoming season.

data.title: APAC dominant in $6.34 trillion global packaged food market in 2025, set to exceed $8 trillion by 2031 - Mordor Intelligence.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, as of February 17, 2026, data from Mordor Intelligence reveals that the worldwide packaged food market had a value of USD 6.34 trillion in 2025. Projections indicate an increase from USD 6.61 trillion in 2026 to approximately USD 8.15 trillion by 2031. The market's growth is fueled by various factors including...

data.title: India's top manufacturers, including Cadence, Siemens, and Synopsys, join NVIDIA in $134B AI factory initiative.
data.description: Leading technology company NVIDIA has joined forces with Cadence, Siemens, and Synopsys to establish AI-driven factories throughout India. This initiative comes as the country is dedicating a substantial $134 billion towards enhancing its manufacturing capabilities. The collaboration between NVIDIA and these key partners aims to revolutionize the manufacturing sector in India with cutting-edge AI technology.
Breaking: New Zealand Cash Rate Actual 2.25% (Forecast 2.25%, Previous 2.25%)

data.title: Indian tech leaders partner with NVIDIA for AI agents, targeting $500B market by 2030; Infosys, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Persistent onboard.
data.description: Leading Indian IT companies Infosys, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, and Persistent have collaborated to develop AI platforms powered by NVIDIA's open models. These platforms aim to cater to the Indian tech market, which is projected to reach $500 billion by 2030. The companies are leveraging advanced technology to tap into the growing opportunities presented by the evolving tech landscape in India.

data.title: Monks complete 2,300-mile "Walk for Peace" with help from ALLMYNE, promoting meaningful connections in travel.
data.description: Monks recently finished a 2,300-mile journey, with their return aided by the digital platform ALLMYNE. This marks a transition from simply sharing on social media to fostering real connections. The event took place in Fort Worth, Texas on February 17, 2026. The "Walk for Peace" campaign gained significant traction online and culminated in a joyous homecoming gathering for the participants.
